---
title: "Fellows"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
      <script src="/assets/javascript/change_categories_header.js" defer></script>
listing:
  - id: fellows
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/active-fellow-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"
    categories: unnumbered
    page-size: 999

  - id: alumni-fellows
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/alumni-fellow-listing.ejs
    sort: "surname asc"

---
OSC Fellows are early career researchers who do not have a PhD degree and who are (co-)leading grassroots initiatives or (co-)deliver training on open research. We are grateful for their valuable contributions! [Become a Fellow](../about/join-us.qmd) <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>.


## Fellows

::: {#fellows}
:::

## Former Fellows

::: {#alumni-fellows}
:::
